body.title: Slates migrate into memory graph (theigors/slates/YYYYMMDD palace echo)
body.result: Migrated 18 slate files to clan.memories as REFERENCE rows under SLATES_ROOT. Palace pointers at theigors/slates/YYYYMMDD. Metadata.sections parsed best-effort from ## headers. Text files remain hand-edited working copies; slate_manager.py auto-regen deferred to future ticket.
body.description:
Today: slate = plain text file at ~/.TheIgors/claudecode/YYYYMMDD.slate.txt. Move canonical storage into the memory graph; the text file becomes an echo.

## Proposed shape
- Each slate = memory row: memory_type=REFERENCE, parent_id=<slates-root>, metadata.date=YYYY-MM-DD with planned/ad_hoc/done sections as JSON sub-fields
- theigors/slates palace subtree with one pointer node per day
- slate_manager.py reshapes to read/write memory rows; text file re-renders on every update

## Blocked by
- T-palace-as-source-of-truth
